plugin.label: Alibaba Cloud Bailian
plugin.description: Alibaba Cloud Model Studio provider with OpenAI Responses, OpenAI Chat Completions, Anthropic Messages, and DashScope protocols.

parameters.title: Alibaba Cloud Bailian Parameters
parameters.description: Provider-level request parameters for Bailian protocol selection and Qwen generation controls.

api_protocol.label: API Protocol
api_protocol.description: Select which Bailian-compatible protocol this request should use. The shared API key works across protocols.

reasoning_effort.label: Reasoning Effort
reasoning_effort.description: Controls reasoning effort for compatible reasoning models when the selected protocol supports it.

enable_thinking.label: Enable Thinking
enable_thinking.description: Requests Qwen thinking output when supported by the selected model and protocol.

enable_search.label: Enable Search
enable_search.description: Allows the model to use Bailian search capabilities when supported.

temperature.label: Temperature
temperature.description: Controls output randomness. Higher values make responses more varied.

top_p.label: Top P
top_p.description: Nucleus sampling threshold that limits candidates by cumulative token probability.

max_tokens.label: Max Tokens
max_tokens.description: Output token limit used by Chat Completions, Anthropic Messages, and DashScope-compatible requests.

max_output_tokens.label: Max Output Tokens
max_output_tokens.description: Output token limit used by OpenAI Responses-compatible requests.

response_format.label: Response Format
response_format.description: Requests plain text or JSON object output when the selected protocol and model support it.

tool_choice.label: Tool Choice
tool_choice.description: Controls whether the model may, must, or must not call tools.

plugin.label: 阿里云百炼
plugin.description: 支持 OpenAI Responses、OpenAI Chat Completions、Anthropic Messages 和 DashScope 协议的阿里云百炼模型供应商。

parameters.title: 阿里云百炼参数
parameters.description: 用于选择百炼协议和控制 Qwen 生成行为的供应商级请求参数。

api_protocol.label: API 协议
api_protocol.description: 选择本次请求使用的百炼兼容协议；同一个 API Key 可在这些协议间共用。

reasoning_effort.label: 推理强度
reasoning_effort.description: 在所选协议支持时，控制推理模型投入的推理量。

enable_thinking.label: 启用思考
enable_thinking.description: 在模型和协议支持时，请求 Qwen 返回思考内容。

enable_search.label: 启用搜索
enable_search.description: 在支持时允许模型使用百炼搜索能力。

temperature.label: 温度
temperature.description: 控制输出随机性，值越高越发散。

top_p.label: Top P
top_p.description: nucleus sampling 采样阈值，限制候选 token 的累计概率。

max_tokens.label: 最大 Token 数
max_tokens.description: Chat Completions、Anthropic Messages 和 DashScope 兼容请求使用的输出 token 上限。

max_output_tokens.label: 最大输出 Token 数
max_output_tokens.description: OpenAI Responses 兼容请求使用的输出 token 上限。

response_format.label: 响应格式
response_format.description: 在所选协议和模型支持时，请求文本或 JSON Object 输出。

tool_choice.label: 工具选择
tool_choice.description: 控制模型可以、必须或不得调用工具。

plugin.label: Anthropic
plugin.description: Anthropic Messages API model provider runtime extension.

parameters.title: Anthropic Messages Parameters
parameters.description: Provider-level request parameters supported by the Anthropic Messages API bridge.

thinking_type.label: Thinking
thinking_type.description: Enables extended thinking for compatible Claude models.

thinking_budget_tokens.label: Thinking Budget Tokens
thinking_budget_tokens.description: Token budget for extended thinking. It must be lower than Max Tokens.

tool_choice.label: Tool Choice
tool_choice.description: Controls whether the model may or must use tools.

plugin.label: Anthropic
plugin.description: Anthropic Messages API 模型供应商运行时扩展。

parameters.title: Anthropic Messages 参数
parameters.description: Anthropic Messages API 调用桥支持的供应商级请求参数。

thinking_type.label: 扩展思考
thinking_type.description: 为兼容的 Claude 模型启用 extended thinking。

thinking_budget_tokens.label: 思考预算 Token 数
thinking_budget_tokens.description: extended thinking 使用的 token 预算，必须小于最大 Token 数。

tool_choice.label: 工具选择
tool_choice.description: 控制模型是否可以或必须调用工具。

parameters.title: DeepSeek Chat Completions Parameters
parameters.description: Provider-level request parameters supported by the dedicated DeepSeek Chat Completions bridge.

thinking_type.label: Thinking Type
thinking_type.description: Controls whether DeepSeek thinking mode is enabled.

reasoning_effort.label: Reasoning Effort
reasoning_effort.description: Controls how much reasoning effort the model should spend.

response_format.label: Response Format
response_format.description: Requests text or JSON object output.

stop.label: Stop
stop.description: Text sequence that stops generation early. Supports one string or a JSON array of strings.

tool_choice.label: Tool Choice
tool_choice.description: Controls whether the model may or must call tools.

logprobs.label: Logprobs
logprobs.description: Requests log probability information for output tokens.

top_logprobs.label: Top Logprobs
top_logprobs.description: Number of token alternatives with log probabilities to return.

user_id.label: User ID
user_id.description: Stable end-user identifier forwarded to DeepSeek.

plugin.label: DeepSeek
plugin.description: DeepSeek 模型供应商运行时扩展。

parameters.title: DeepSeek Chat Completions 参数
parameters.description: DeepSeek 专用 Chat Completions 调用桥支持的供应商级请求参数。

thinking_type.label: 思考模式
thinking_type.description: 控制是否启用 DeepSeek 思考模式。

reasoning_effort.label: 推理强度
reasoning_effort.description: 控制模型投入的推理量。

response_format.label: 响应格式
response_format.description: 请求文本或 JSON object 输出。

stop.label: 停止词
stop.description: 指定提前停止生成的文本片段；支持单个字符串或字符串数组 JSON。

tool_choice.label: 工具选择
tool_choice.description: 控制模型是否可以或必须调用工具。

logprobs.label: Logprobs
logprobs.description: 请求返回输出 token 的 log probability 信息。

top_logprobs.label: Top Logprobs
top_logprobs.description: 每个 token 返回的候选 log probability 数量。

user_id.label: 用户 ID
user_id.description: 转发给 DeepSeek 的稳定终端用户标识。

plugin.label: Gemini
plugin.description: Google Gemini model provider runtime extension.

parameters.title: Gemini GenerateContent Parameters
parameters.description: Provider-level request parameters supported by the Gemini v1beta GenerateContent bridge.

top_k.label: Top K
top_k.description: Limits sampling to the top K token candidates.

stop.label: Stop
stop.description: Text sequence that stops generation early. Supports one string or a JSON array of strings.

response_format.label: Response Format
response_format.description: Requests text or JSON object output.

include_thoughts.label: Include Thoughts
include_thoughts.description: Requests streamed thought deltas when the selected model supports them.

tool_choice.label: Tool Choice
tool_choice.description: Controls whether the model may or must call tools.

plugin.label: Gemini
plugin.description: Google Gemini 模型供应商运行时扩展。

parameters.title: Gemini GenerateContent 参数
parameters.description: Gemini v1beta GenerateContent 调用桥支持的供应商级请求参数。

top_k.label: Top K
top_k.description: 限制采样时保留的候选 token 数。

stop.label: 停止词
stop.description: 指定提前停止生成的文本片段；支持单个字符串或字符串数组 JSON。

response_format.label: 响应格式
response_format.description: 请求文本或 JSON object 输出。

thinking_budget.label: 思考预算
thinking_budget.description: 可选的 Gemini thinking token 预算。

include_thoughts.label: 包含思考
include_thoughts.description: 在所选模型支持时请求流式思考增量。

tool_choice.label: 工具选择
tool_choice.description: 控制模型是否可以或必须调用工具。

plugin.label: OpenAI
plugin.description: OpenAI Responses API model provider runtime extension.

transport_mode.label: Transport mode
transport_mode.description: Controls how OpenAI Responses streaming is transported.

http_sse.label: HTTP SSE
http_sse.description: Use Responses HTTP streaming by default.

responses_websocket.label: Responses WebSocket
responses_websocket.description: Use the Responses WebSocket transport explicitly.

auto.label: Auto
auto.description: Try Responses WebSocket first, then fall back to HTTP SSE when safe.

demo.title: OpenAI Provider Demo
demo.subtitle: Use the local demo to load this plugin into plugin-runner, validate credentials, inspect /models, and send a Responses API invocation.

parameters.title: OpenAI Responses Parameters
parameters.description: Provider-level request parameters supported by the OpenAI Responses API bridge.

reasoning_effort.label: Reasoning Effort
reasoning_effort.description: Controls how much reasoning effort a reasoning model should spend.

temperature.label: Temperature
temperature.description: Controls output randomness. Higher values make responses more varied.

top_p.label: Top P
top_p.description: Nucleus sampling threshold that limits candidates by cumulative token probability.

max_output_tokens.label: Max Output Tokens
max_output_tokens.description: Maximum number of output tokens the model may generate.

response_format.label: Response Format
response_format.description: Requests plain text or JSON object output through Responses text.format.

tool_choice.label: Tool Choice
tool_choice.description: Controls whether the model may or must call tools.

store.label: Store
store.description: Controls whether OpenAI may store the response according to the API request option.

plugin.label: OpenAI
plugin.description: OpenAI Responses API 模型供应商运行时扩展。

transport_mode.label: 传输模式
transport_mode.description: 控制 OpenAI Responses 流式调用使用的传输方式。

http_sse.label: HTTP SSE
http_sse.description: 默认使用 Responses HTTP 流式传输。

responses_websocket.label: Responses WebSocket
responses_websocket.description: 显式使用 Responses WebSocket 传输。

auto.label: 自动
auto.description: 优先尝试 Responses WebSocket，并在安全时回退到 HTTP SSE。

demo.title: OpenAI 调试页
demo.subtitle: 本地加载插件到 plugin-runner，验证凭据、查看模型列表并发送一次 Responses API 调用。

parameters.title: OpenAI Responses 参数
parameters.description: OpenAI Responses API 调用桥支持的供应商级请求参数。

reasoning_effort.label: 推理强度
reasoning_effort.description: 控制推理模型投入的推理量。

temperature.label: 温度
temperature.description: 控制输出随机性，值越高越发散。

top_p.label: Top P
top_p.description: nucleus sampling 采样阈值，限制候选 token 的累计概率。

max_output_tokens.label: 最大输出 Token 数
max_output_tokens.description: 模型可生成的最大输出 token 数。

response_format.label: 响应格式
response_format.description: 通过 Responses text.format 请求文本或 JSON object 输出。

tool_choice.label: 工具选择
tool_choice.description: 控制模型是否可以或必须调用工具。

store.label: 存储响应
store.description: 控制是否按 API 请求选项允许 OpenAI 存储响应。

plugin.label: OpenAI-Compatible API
plugin.description: Expose an OpenAI-compatible chat completion API.

demo.title: OpenAI-Compatible API Provider Demo
demo.subtitle: Use the local demo to load this plugin into plugin-runner, validate credentials, inspect /models, and send a chat completion.

parameters.title: OpenAI-Compatible Chat Completions Parameters
parameters.description: Provider-level request parameters supported by the OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions invocation bridge.

temperature.label: Temperature
temperature.description: Controls output randomness. Higher values make responses more varied; avoid changing this and Top P aggressively at the same time.

top_p.label: Top P
top_p.description: Nucleus sampling threshold that limits candidates by cumulative token probability. Usually keep this disabled or at its default.

n.label: N
n.description: Number of candidate completions to request. The current 1flowbase LLM output contract reads the first choice.

max_tokens.label: Max Tokens
max_tokens.description: Legacy output token limit. Some compatible services still only support this field.

max_completion_tokens.label: Max Completion Tokens
max_completion_tokens.description: Newer output token limit covering visible output and reasoning tokens.

presence_penalty.label: Presence Penalty
presence_penalty.description: Increases the tendency to introduce new topics. Higher values reduce repeated themes.

frequency_penalty.label: Frequency Penalty
frequency_penalty.description: Reduces repeated wording based on token frequency. Higher values suppress frequent repetition.

stop.label: Stop
stop.description: Text sequence that stops generation early. Supports one string or a JSON array of strings.

logit_bias.label: Logit Bias
logit_bias.description: Adjusts generation preference for specific token IDs, usually to strongly ban or encourage tokens.

logprobs.label: Logprobs
logprobs.description: Requests log probability information for output tokens. Provider support varies.

top_logprobs.label: Top Logprobs
top_logprobs.description: Number of token alternatives with log probabilities to return. Usually requires Logprobs to be enabled.

seed.label: Seed
seed.description: Optional random seed. When supported by the provider, it improves repeatability for the same input.

reasoning_effort.label: Reasoning Effort
reasoning_effort.description: Controls how much reasoning effort a reasoning model should spend. Provider support varies.

plugin.label: OpenAI-Compatible API
plugin.description: 兼容 OpenAI Chat Completions API 的服务。

demo.title: OpenAI-Compatible 调试页
demo.subtitle: 本地加载插件到 plugin-runner，验证凭据、查看模型列表并发送一次对话请求。

parameters.title: OpenAI 兼容 Chat Completions 参数
parameters.description: OpenAI 兼容 Chat Completions 调用桥支持的供应商级请求参数。

temperature.label: 温度
temperature.description: 控制输出随机性，值越高越发散；通常不要和 Top P 同时大幅调整。

top_p.label: Top P
top_p.description: nucleus sampling 采样阈值，限制候选 token 的累计概率；通常保持关闭或默认值。

n.label: 候选数量
n.description: 请求返回的候选结果数量；运行时仍按当前 1flowbase LLM 输出契约读取第一条结果。

max_tokens.label: 最大 Token 数
max_tokens.description: 旧版输出 token 上限字段；部分兼容服务仍只识别该字段。

max_completion_tokens.label: 最大补全 Token 数
max_completion_tokens.description: 新版输出 token 上限字段，覆盖可见输出和推理 token。

presence_penalty.label: 存在惩罚
presence_penalty.description: 提高模型谈论新主题的倾向，值越高越不容易重复已出现内容。

frequency_penalty.label: 频率惩罚
frequency_penalty.description: 按 token 出现频率降低重复用词概率，值越高越抑制高频重复。

stop.label: 停止词
stop.description: 指定停止生成的文本片段；支持单个字符串或字符串数组 JSON。

logit_bias.label: Logit 偏置
logit_bias.description: 调整指定 token 的生成偏好，通常用于强制禁止或鼓励特定 token。

logprobs.label: Logprobs
logprobs.description: 请求返回输出 token 的 log probability 信息；具体支持度取决于供应商。

top_logprobs.label: Top Logprobs
top_logprobs.description: 每个 token 返回的候选 log probability 数量；通常需要同时开启 Logprobs。

seed.label: 随机种子
seed.description: 可选随机种子；供应商支持时用于提高相同输入下的结果稳定性。

reasoning_effort.label: 推理强度
reasoning_effort.description: 控制推理模型投入的推理量；具体支持度取决于供应商。
